sections.paragraph:
(“hunting”), [Kenaz], pr.n.-

(1) of an Edomite sprung from Esau, and of a district of Arabia, taking its name from him, Gen 36:11, 15 Gen 36:15, 42 Gen 36:42.-(2) of the father (or rather grandfather) of Othniel, the brother of Caleb, Jos 15:17 Jud 1:13 1Ch 4:13 see קְנִזִּי -(3) a grandson of Caleb, ibid., verse 15.
